description: Investment partnership between Hayyim b. Shelomo Hazaq and his wife, approving the receiving of a sum of 63000 m[edin] k[esif] as a payment for his business partner. This document is an unfinished draft therefore the name of Hayyim Hazaq's wife is missing and the partnership is unfinished. Based on the paleography this partnership is likely late-18th or early 19th-century. AA. MCD.
tags: Late Heb, 18th or 19th c, FGP stub
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
